audit_items.proof_trace: Function allocation_add_permission() can return NULL when parameters are invalid, but caller at line 324 dereferences the result on line 334 without NULL check. This violates the required NULL-check invariant.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends malformed TURN channel bind message causing allocation_add_permission() to return NULL, leading to null pointer dereference crash when tinfo->chns is accessed.
